titleStmt.title: SII 16.93: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 93. (A.R. No. 544 of 1909.) VĒMALŪRPĀḌU, SATTENAPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar lying near the Śiva temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1452, Vikṛiti, Kārtika, śu. 12, Wednesday, corresponding to 1530 A.D., November 2.

This incomplete inscription, in Telugu as well as Sanskrit verse, records that Peda Tirumalayyadēva-mahārāju, great-grandson of Lakkarāju of Salaka-vaṁśa, grandson of Śiṅggarāju and son of Salakarāju, had a tank built and a garden laid near it and granted both of them to god Gōpīnātha of Velupālem in Koṇḍavīḍu. It also records that he had a maṇḍapa constructed in the garden, installed god Hanumanta therein and provided for the worship of the god with some gifts, the details of which are lost. The donor bears the titles Tuṁbaḷagoppa, Basavaśaṅkara, Vondānemaṇḍalīkara-gaṇḍa, Yaḍavaladarāyarāhuta-vēśyā-bhujaṁga, Navalaksha-Teluṅgulagaṇḍa, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavarṣaṁbbulu 1452 Aguneṁ
ṭi vikṛti saṁvvatsara kārttika śu 12 bu
dhavārāna śrīmanmahārājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrī Acyutadēvamahārāyalu pṛ
thivi sāmrājyamu sēyucuṁḍagā
nu śrīmatkāśyapagōtrādityavaṁśapraśa
stulu śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara tu
ṁbaḷagoppa basavaśaṁkara voṁddānemaṁḍḍa
līkaragaṁḍḍa yaḍavaladarāya
rāhutavēśyābhujaṁgga guttihaṁnni
Oragaṁḍa kādevimōdevitalaguṁḍḍu
gaṁḍḍa navalakṣateluṁggulagaṁḍḍa jagatā
pyanēka birudapraśastulu salakāvaṁśa
julu lakkarājuṁgāri prapautṛlu śiṁ
ggarājugāri pautṛlu salakarājugā
ri putṛlu vedatirumalayadēve ma
hārājulugāru tama tallidaṁḍṛ
laku buṁṇyamugānu koṁḍḍavīṭiki
vuttarabhāgāna bejavāḍa teruvunanu
taṭakamu gaṭiṁci Ā taṭakamu vada
nu vanamu veṭiṁci Ā vanamu ko
ṁḍḍaviṭi velupāleṁ miṁda gōpi
nāthaniki samarpiṁci yī vana ta
ṭakasamīpāna maṁḍḍapaṁ gaṭiṁci
hanumaṁtaperumāḷanu prati
ṣṭhacēsi yī hanumaṁtaperu
māḷaku Aṁggaraṁggavaibhavāla
kuṁnnu Amṛtapaḷakunnu naivēdya
kaṭaḍa mahōtsavālakunnu sama
rpiṁcina The space after this is
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ pa
radattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavētu .
śrīmanmaṁḍḍalanāthamauḷivila
sanmāṇikya dīpāvaḷīdīpyatpāda
yugācyutēśvara mahārā
yēṇa sanmānitaḥ . haimachatra
ka cāmarādika mahāsāmrā
jya sarvaṁsahā dhaurēya ssalakā
vanīpatisuta stimmaprabhu rva
rdhatē . śrīmāN salakaya ti
mma bhūpatimaṇissarvārthi
ciṁttāmaṇissōyaṁ sthā
pitavāN vanaṁ sthiradhanaṁ śrī The
Digital edition of SII 16.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
